candidates.title: Feature Absorption as Optimal Compression: A Null-Result Study with Methodological Insights
candidates.summary: Reframe absorption as rate-distortion optimal compression rather than a failure mode. Report honest null results on downstream task degradation (H1-H4), the one robust finding (H5: precision invariant, recall variable), and the falsified inhibition graph hypothesis (H6: precision@20=0.0). Contributions: rigorous null-result reporting, falsified mechanistic hypothesis, reusable evaluation framework (baseline correction, precision-recall decomposition, EC50).
hypotheses: H1-H4: Absorption does not significantly degrade steering, probing, or efficiency (SUPPORTED, null)
H5: Absorption affects recall, not precision (SUPPORTED)
H6: Decoder correlation graph predicts absorption (FALSIFIED: precision@20=0.0)
H7: Absorption is rate-distortion optimal (theoretical framing)
H8: Precision-recall asymmetry reflects information redistribution
H9: Absorption rate correlates with hierarchical co-occurrence strength (exploratory)
H10: Random SAE baselines show similar absorption patterns (exploratory)
candidates.pilot_focus: All primary experiments completed. Remaining: H9 (co-occurrence analysis, ~30 min), H10 (random SAE baseline, ~30 min).
candidates.novelty_claim: First systematic null-result study of absorption-downstream correlation with multiple comparison correction. First falsification of decoder-correlation-based absorption prediction. First precision-recall decomposition and EC50 analysis for SAE evaluation. First rate-distortion reframing of absorption.
risk_factors: Paper may be dismissed as 'we found nothing'
First-letter task may be too narrow
Field skepticism about SAE value may depress interest
mitigation: Strong framing: honest null results + methodological contributions + falsified hypothesis
Acknowledge limitations explicitly; frame as pilot calling for replication

evidence_quality.statistical_significance: Zero significant results after correction (honest null)
evidence_quality.effect_size: Negligible for H1-H4; robust for H5
evidence_quality.methodological_rigor: High --- random baseline, MCP, cross-layer, EC50, precision-recall
evidence_quality.generalizability: Poor --- single model; Pythia cross-validation inconclusive

prior_evidence_used: H5 (precision invariant, recall variable) --- explained by optimal compression
Feature U (24.2% abs, 100% steering) --- supports benign absorption claim
EC50 null result --- supports no efficiency degradation

candidates.title: The Local Inhibition Graph: A Neuroscience-Inspired Training-Free Diagnostic for Feature Absorption
candidates.summary: PREVIOUS FRONT-RUNNER (iter_009). Proposed first connection between LCA lateral inhibition and SAE absorption via decoder correlation graph (W_dec^T W_dec = G_LCA). Pilot execution falsified core hypothesis: precision@20 = 0.0 (predicted >= 0.10). The structural correspondence does not translate into predictive power. Dropped.
hypotheses: H6: Graph edges predict absorption pairs (FALSIFIED: precision@20=0.0)
H7-H10: Derived hypotheses moot after H6 falsification
candidates.pilot_focus: Completed. Graph constructed for GPT-2 Small SAE (24K latents). Validated against Chanin absorption pairs. Result: 0/520 predictions correct.
candidates.novelty_claim: First LCA-SAE connection (exact structural correspondence). First local inhibition graph for SAE diagnostics.
mitigation: Retain as falsified hypothesis in paper (valuable negative result)
Report what the failure implies: decoder correlations do not capture absorption dynamics

evidence_quality.methodological_rigor: High --- deterministic computation, clear falsification criterion

prior_evidence_used: H5 (precision invariant, recall variable) --- was to be explained by competitive suppression
H1b (delta-corrected correlation at layer 8) --- was to be explained by layer-dependent inhibition

candidates.title: Feature Absorption as Optimal Compression: A Trade-off Analysis
candidates.summary: ORIGINAL BACKUP (iter_009). Reframe absorption as predictable consequence of interpretability-compression trade-off. Now merged into front-runner cand_g as the primary intellectual framing.
hypotheses: Pareto frontier exists for (reconstruction, sparsity, absorption)
No SAE architecture dominates on all three metrics
candidates.novelty_claim: First rate-distortion reframing of absorption. First three-way Pareto frontier.
mitigation: Ground in Chanin et al. theorem, not ad hoc reasoning
Report honestly if trade-off is not observed

candidates.title: Rigorous Null-Result Study with Methodological Insights for SAE Evaluation
candidates.summary: FALLBACK if optimal compression framing is rejected. Pure null-result paper emphasizing methodological contributions: baseline correction, precision-recall decomposition, EC50 analysis, multiple comparison correction. No theoretical claims.
hypotheses: H1-H4: Absorption does not degrade downstream tasks (null)
candidates.novelty_claim: First systematic null-result study with rigorous MCP. First reusable evaluation framework.
risk_factors: May be dismissed as 'we found nothing'

pivot_conditions.front_runner_status: cand_g is active front-runner; cand_f dropped due to H6 falsification
pivot_conditions.front_runner_to_fallback: If optimal compression framing is rejected by reviewers, fall back to cand_h (pure null-result + methodology)
pivot_conditions.any_to_null_result: If H9 or H10 produce unexpected negative results, cand_h is always available
pivot_conditions.front_runner_strengthened: If H9 (co-occurrence correlation) is significant AND H10 (random baseline) shows trained > random, the optimal compression claim is strengthened

synthesis_metadata.key_revision: Front-runner pivoted from cand_f (Local Inhibition Graph) to cand_g (Optimal Compression) due to decisive H6 falsification. The inhibition graph is retained as a valuable falsified hypothesis.

perspective_weighting.contrarian: Highest weight --- 'absorption is optimal compression' is the intellectual backbone
perspective_weighting.empiricist: Highest weight --- rigorous controls and honest reporting are the methodological backbone
perspective_weighting.theoretical: Strong influence --- rate-distortion framework provides formal grounding
perspective_weighting.pragmatist: Moderate influence --- all experiments completed, no new compute needed
